summary: Runtime behavior passes, but current Spec clause IDs drift from their test and acceptance anchors.
inspection_summary: Compared Story, Architecture, Test Plan, Spec, source, CLI routing, tests, graph traces, and exact-head evidence; focused suite passed 47/47.
evidence: Source behavior, legacy routing, fallback, repair, migration, and fail-closed paths pass.
Spec S-002/S-004/S-005 and INV-002/INV-005 meanings were swapped relative to stable test anchors.
judgment_delta: Functional evidence was sufficient, but exact traceability remained contradictory.

findings.detail: Restore stable clause IDs so Spec statements match their test and acceptance anchors.
